| be cloned     |                                                      |

| modulatory    |                                                      |
| function in   |                                                      |
| combination   |                                                      |
| with our      |                                                      |
| anti-TREM2    |                                                      |
| mAb.          |                                                      |
+---------------+------------------------------------------------------+

| CCL17/CTAC,   |                                                      |
| CCL19, CCL22, |                                                      |
| CCL23, CCL24, |                                                      |
| CCL26, CCL27, |                                                      |
| lymph         |                                                      |

| Tasks         |                                                      |
| 1.1--1.2 to   |                                                      |

| 8--10         |                                                      |

| cell          |                                                      |

| activity.     |                                                      |
